name: Barcode
description: Inked scan bars in irregular widths, the odd one printed in red — every redraw re-spaces the code into a new cipher.

code.style: --bar1: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --bar2: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color3)); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 8%; height: 84%; left: @rand(4%, 36%); width: @rand(5%, 16%); background: var(--bar1); transition: ease 500ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 8%; height: 84%; left: @rand(54%, 88%); width: @rand(4%, 12%); background: var(--bar2); transition: ease 500ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
